verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja, reversionis Aggæi et Zachariæ.   Beatus vir qui timet Dominum :  in mandatis ejus volet nimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥לְלוּ־יָ֨הּ ׀ אַשְׁרֵי־אִ֭ישׁ יָרֵ֣א אֶת־יְהֹוָ֑ה בְּ֝מִצְוֺתָ֗יו חָפֵ֥ץ מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed is the man that feareth the Lord: he shall delight exceedingly in his commandments.
verses.finnish_biblia: Halleluja! Autuas on, joka pelkää Herraa: joka hänen käskyjänsä sangen himoitsee.
verses.king_james: Praise ye the Lord. Blessed is the man that feareth the Lord, that delighteth greatly in his commandments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Potens in terra erit semen ejus ;  generatio rectorum benedicetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גִּבּ֣וֹר בָּ֭אָרֶץ יִהְיֶ֣ה זַרְע֑וֹ דּ֖וֹר יְשָׁרִ֣ים יְבֹרָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: His seed shall be mighty upon earth: the generation of the righteous shall be blessed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen siemenensä on valtias maan päällä: hurskasten suku pitää siunatuksi tuleman.
verses.king_james: His seed shall be mighty upon earth: the generation of the upright shall be blessed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gloria et divitiæ in domo ejus,  et justitia ejus manet in sæculum sæculi.
verses.douay_rheims: Glory and wealth shall be in his house: and his justice remaineth for ever and ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Rikkaus ja runsaus on hänen huoneessansa, ja hänen vanhurskautensa pysyy ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Wealth and riches shall be in his house: and his righteousness endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exortum est in tenebris lumen rectis :  misericors, et miserator, et justus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זָ֘רַ֤ח בַּחֹ֣שֶׁךְ א֭וֹר לַיְשָׁרִ֑ים חַנּ֖וּן וְרַח֣וּם וְצַדִּֽיק׃
verses.douay_rheims: To the righteous a light is risen up in darkness: he is merciful, and compassionate and just.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hurskaille koittaa valkeus pimeässä, armolliselta, laupiaalta ja vanhurskaalta.
verses.king_james: Unto the upright there ariseth light in the darkness: he is gracious, and full of compassion, and righteous.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jucundus homo qui miseretur et commodat ;  disponet sermones suos in judicio :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טֽוֹב־אִ֭ישׁ חוֹנֵ֣ן וּמַלְוֶ֑ה יְכַלְכֵּ֖ל דְּבָרָ֣יו בְּמִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.douay_rheims: Acceptable is the man that sheweth mercy and lendeth: he shall order his words with judgment:
verses.finnish_biblia: Hyvä ihminen on laupias ja mielellänsä lainaa, ja toimittaa asiansa toimellisesti.
verses.king_james: A good man sheweth favour, and lendeth: he will guide his affairs with discretion.

verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־לְעוֹלָ֥ם לֹֽא־יִמּ֑וֹט לְזֵ֥כֶר ע֝וֹלָ֗ם יִהְיֶ֥ה צַדִּֽיק׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because he shall not be moved for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hän pysyy ijankaikkisesti: ei vanhurskas ikänä unhoteta.
verses.king_james: Surely he shall not be moved for ever: the righteous shall be in everlasting remembrance.

verses.latin_vulgate: In memoria æterna erit justus ;  ab auditione mala non timebit.  Paratum cor ejus sperare in Domino,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִשְּׁמוּעָ֣ה רָ֭עָה לֹ֣א יִירָ֑א נָכ֥וֹן לִ֝בּ֗וֹ בָּטֻ֥חַ בַּיהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The just shall be in everlasting remembrance: he shall not fear the evil hearing. His heart is ready to hope in the Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska rangaistus tulee, niin ei hän pelkää: hänen sydämensä uskaltaa lujasti Herran päälle.
verses.king_james: He shall not be afraid of evil tidings: his heart is fixed, trusting in the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: confirmatum est cor ejus ;  non commovebitur donec despiciat inimicos suos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סָמ֣וּךְ לִ֭בּוֹ לֹ֣א יִירָ֑א עַ֖ד אֲשֶׁר־יִרְאֶ֣ה בְצָרָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: His heart is strengthened, he shall not be moved until he look over his enemies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen sydämensä on vahvistettu ja ei pelkää, siihenasti kuin hän näkee ilonsa vihollisistansa.
verses.king_james: His heart is established, he shall not be afraid, until he see his desire upon his enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dispersit, dedit pauperibus ;  justitia ejus manet in sæculum sæculi :  cornu ejus exaltabitur in gloria.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פִּזַּ֤ר ׀ נָ֘תַ֤ן לָאֶבְיוֹנִ֗ים צִ֭דְקָתוֹ עֹמֶ֣דֶת לָעַ֑ד קַ֝רְנ֗וֹ תָּר֥וּם בְּכָבֽוֹד׃
verses.douay_rheims: He hath distributed, he hath given to the poor: his justice remaineth for ever and ever: his horn shall be exalted in glory.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän jakaa ja antaa vaivaisille: hänen vanhurskautensa pysyy ijankaikkisesti: hänen sarvensa korotetaan kunnialla.
verses.king_james: He hath dispersed, he hath given to the poor; his righteousness endureth for ever; his horn shall be exalted with honour.

verses.latin_vulgate: Peccator videbit, et irascetur ;  dentibus suis fremet et tabescet :  desiderium peccatorum peribit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָ֘שָׁ֤ע יִרְאֶ֨ה ׀ וְכָעָ֗ס שִׁנָּ֣יו יַחֲרֹ֣ק וְנָמָ֑ס תַּאֲוַ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים תֹּאבֵֽד׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The wicked shall see, and shall be angry, he shall gnash with his teeth and pine away: the desire of the wicked shall perish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalatoin näkee sen ja närkästyy: hän pureskelee hampaitansa ja nääntyy; sillä mitä jumalattomat halajavat, se tyhjäksi tulee.
verses.king_james: The wicked shall see it, and be grieved; he shall gnash with his teeth, and melt away: the desire of the wicked shall perish.
